arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs Manchester City – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: The final FA Cup quarter-final sees Bournemouth battle it out with Manchester City. Andoni Iraola’s side earned their spot amongst the last eight after prevailing in a penalty shootout against Wolves. The Spanish tactician’s defensive options have been dealt a huge blow by the suspensions of Milos Kerkez and Dean Huijsen. Both players have accumulated […] The post Bournemouth vs Manchester City – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: How to watch Bournemouth vs Man City for FREE: TV channel and live stream for FA Cup today
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s side are out to avenge the Premier League loss from earlier in the season

arts.ttl: Manchester City interested in another Frankfurt star
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly interested in Hugo Larsson from Eintracht Frankfurt - could he follow in Omar Marmoush's footsteps and join Pep Guardiola's team?

arts.ttl: Don't want know' - Pep Guardiola issues crystal clear warning to Man City stars thinking of leaving
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola had a clear message to any Manchester City players thinking about leaving this summer - with particular reference to Kyle Walker and Jack Grealish.

arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's FA Cup fixtures, including Bournemouth vs. Man City

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham genuinely interested in signing Manchester City ace with 32 goals & 41 assists
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been linked with a move for Manchester City attacker Jack Grealish this summer, as doubts grow over his future at the Etihad. Grealish first rose to prominence at Aston Villa, captaining the club and playing a pivotal role in their promotion to the Premier League in 2019. Across 213 appearances for Villa, […] The post Report: Tottenham genuinely interested in signing Manchester City ace with 32 goals & 41 assists appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Kevin de Bruyne has been the FA Cup man of the decade - but Bournemouth could be his swansong
arts.sum: Manchester City play Crystal Palace in the FA Cup quarter-finals this weekend, with Belgian playmaker Kevin de Bruyne looking to continue his superb goalscoring run in the competition and land his third trophy since making his debut in the competition in 2016

arts.ttl: Ederson call made, Grealish return, Bobb back - Man City predicted XI vs Bournemouth
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola must weigh up going as strong as possible vs Bournemouth to book an FA Cup semi-final spot, or reward some of the players who got them to the quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Guardiola: My performance has been 'really poor'
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has said his own efforts this season have been "really poor" as his side struggle to recapture their title-winning form.

arts.ttl: If Man City ARE guilty, they're no different from cheats like Ben Johnson or Lance Armstrong and must have titles STRIPPED, writes RIATH AL-SAMARRAI
arts.sum: RIATH AL-SAMARRAI: Manchester City made an announcement on Friday morning. It wasn't the one we're all waiting on, but they do have a new energy drink partner in Vietnam.
